_meta.description: Master taxonomy for BioTechStocks screener -- L1.L2.L3(.L4) hierarchical tags
rules: Every L3 term must appear under exactly ONE L1.L2 parent (no duplicates across branches)
L4 sub-segments nest under L3 when a market has distinct drug niches (e.g. dmd.gene_therapy, dmd.exon51)
Disease classification follows the organ/system affected, not the treatment mechanism
No 'multi_indication' catch-alls -- use the lead/primary indication
Rare diseases get 'rare: true' on the indication object, not the area tag
Commercial products need penPct set to actual market share (revenue / TAM)

display_names.kinase_inhibitor: Kinase inhibitor (kinases are enzymes; separated by pharma convention)
display_names.protein_protein_inhibitor: Protein-protein interaction inhibitor (PPI / BH3-mimetic / surface mimetic)
